title: DAG Node Schema — prolate-gram-coercivity program
description: Schema for a single node in the XXII proof dependency graph. Every lemma, theorem, conjecture, hypothesis, black box, or open problem must conform to this schema before being added to dag_nodes.json.

id.description: Unique node identifier. Convention: P1-P13 (proved), BB1-BB7 (black box), R1 (reduction), O1-O6 (open), H (hypothesis), C (conjecture).

type.description: Node type. Determines validation rules (see compiler/RULES.md).

statement.description: Human-readable mathematical statement. May contain LaTeX.

source.description: Where this node is proved or defined. For BB: external paper. For T: section in XXII outline.

axis.description: Which research axis this node belongs to.

used_in.description: IDs of nodes that directly depend on this node (outgoing edges).

requires.description: IDs of nodes this node directly depends on (incoming edges).

on_minimal_path.description: True if this node is on the minimal proof path to the Main Theorem (P13). Nodes on the minimal path may not depend on O1 or O2.

closes.description: For type O only: which hypothesis or conjecture this open problem would close if resolved.

mechanism.description: For type O only: explicit constructive mechanism for resolution.

bb_source_paper.description: For type BB only: exact paper/theorem reference. BB nodes may not appear in 'requires' of any T node that re-proves their content.

notes.description: Optional. Additional remarks for human readers.
